name: terac-screen-rec
description: screen recorder for Terac take home!

scripts.build: npm run build:swift && npm run build:render && tsc && electron-builder --arm64
scripts.build:swift: cd swift-capture && swift build -c release && cp .build/release/ScreenCapture ../resources/ScreenCapture && codesign --sign - --entitlements ../entitlements.plist --force ../resources/ScreenCapture

author: Michael Moriarty
